title: PowerShell automation
description: Create one-command launchers, setup scripts, cleanup scripts and repeatable support workflows for Windows environments.

title: Windows troubleshooting
description: Diagnose startup issues, monitoring problems, network behavior, user-profile leftovers, permissions and system cleanup requirements.

title: GitHub Pages deployment
description: Publish support tools, release links, documentation and CMS-controlled static websites from GitHub repositories.

title: Support dashboard planning
description: Convert repeated technical tasks into clean dashboards, command hubs and user-safe utility screens.

title: Technical documentation
description: Write clear install guides, safety notes, change logs and troubleshooting steps so tools can be maintained by others.

title: CMS-friendly content systems
description: Structure JSON and Pages CMS entries so site content, sections and mode settings can be updated without touching code.
